title: Korean Steamed Egg Bites
description: A simple and delicate Korean-inspired dish made with steamed egg bites. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. In a small bowl, beat the eggs and set aside.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the chopped green onions, cornstarch, and chicken broth.
3. Add the egg mixture to the bowl and stir to combine.
4. Pour the mixture into a small steamer basket lined with parchment paper.
5. Steam the egg mixture over boiling water for 10-12 minutes.
6. Remove the steamer basket from the heat and let it cool slightly.
7. Use a small cookie cutter to cut out egg shapes.
8. Serve the egg bites warm, garnished with additional chopped green onions if desired.
